CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/TextureParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/NodeConverter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/MeshConverter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/BlockParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/ModelResourceParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/FileReferenceConverter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/ShaderParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/FileScanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/FileReferenceParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/ModifierConverter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/MetaDataParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/LineSetResourceParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/Helpers/ConverterHelpers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/Helpers/SceneUtilities.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/Helpers/DebugInfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/Helpers/Guids.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/Common/GlyphModifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/Common/ModelResource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/Common/ModifierList.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/Common/NodeList.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/Common/FileReference.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/Common/ResourceList.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/Common/SceneResources.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/Common/ModelResourceList.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/Common/MetaDataList.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/Common/ParentList.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTFConverter.dir/IDTF/Common/GlyphCommandList.cpp.o -o IDTFConverter  libIFXCoreStatic.a -ldl
